name: Cody Park
description: Cody Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Platte, NE. There are 8 outdoor courts.
open_play_schedule: Visiting Cody Park and courts currently under construction. New courts on the way

name: D&N Event Center
description: Come play pickleball at D&N Event Center in North Platte, NE! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.

name: Memorial Park Pickleball Courts
description: Memorial Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in North Platte, NE. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: North Platte Rec Center
description: North Platte Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Platte, NE. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Salvation Army
description: Salvation Army is a place to play pickleball in North Platte, NE. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
